---
title: "Reinforcement Learning Controller Design for Discrete-Time-Constrained Nonlinear Systems With Weight Initialization Method"
authors:
  - "J. Xu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "Y. Zhong"
  - "J. Rao"
  - "Shunyu Wu"
year: 2024
venue: "IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems"
status: "published"
type: "co-author"
doi: "10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883"
keywords:
  - "reinforcement learning"
  - "constrained nonlinear control"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMC.2023.3344883)

Selected collaboration on constrained nonlinear control and RL-based controller design with weight initialization.
